codeReview.summary: The feature repair is narrowly scoped and correctly aligns the app, test targets, and project defaults to iOS 26.0, which removes the deployment-target mismatch that blocked the shared simulator validation path. The reviewed commit satisfies VAL-PATH-001 because both test bundles remain in the DawnLoop scheme and the worker evidence shows the CI-style build-for-testing/test-without-building flow progressed through both DawnLoopTests and DawnLoopUITests without the prior mismatch error.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, mission docs, skill, architecture guidance, and commit dc29f5f. The project.pbxproj diff consistently updates all relevant IPHONEOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET settings to 26.0, keeps both test bundles wired into the scheme, and matches the shared simulator workflow documented in services.yaml and CI, so this feature passes scrutiny for VAL-PATH-001.
